headline: Dell Dividend Growth Pledge And US$10b Buyback Shape Valuation Debate
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) has pledged to increase its dividend by at least 10% annually through 2030. The company also approved a new US$10b stock buyback program. These capital return plans were announced as a long term commitment to shareholders, indicating confidence in future cash generation. Dell Technologies, best known for its PCs, servers, and infrastructure solutions, is tying its shareholder return policy more closely to its long term cash flow outlook. For income oriented...
